items.name: Vegetable Samosa (2 pieces)
items.description: Puff pastry filled with potatoes, peas and herbs and spices. Served with mint sauce.

items.description: Served with coconut and mango sauce.

items.name: Tandoori Chicken
items.description: All-time favourite chicken marinated with specially selected herbs and spices, skewered and freshly roasted in the Tandoor.

items.name: Seekh Kebab
items.description: Lamb mince marinated overnight with aromatic spices and slowly roasted in the Tandoor oven.

items.name: Chicken Tikka
items.description: Boneless chicken marinated overnight in yoghurt and the chef's secret seasoning, then roasted in the Tandoor. Served with mint sauce

items.description: Marinated with yoghurt and specially selected herbs and spices overnight. Then slow cooked in the Tandoor.

items.name: Himalayan Mixed Platter
items.description: Marinated with yoghurt and specially selected herbs and spices overnight. Then slow cooked in the Tandoor, quarter Tandoori Chicken, two pieces Lamb Cutlet, two pieces Fried Prawn and two pieces Seekh Kebab, served with mint sauce.

items.name: Butter Chicken
items.description: Succulent boneless chicken marinated with yoghurt, spices, cashew nut gravy and fresh cream. Then slow cooked in the Tandoor. "All-time favourite".
